since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.07%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -1.64% · Gold -1.40% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.07%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.07%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +12.44%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +12.44%, ANET +8.49%, SMCI +6.49%, BIDU +5.27%, AVGO +4.51%. Laggards: PANW -4.76%, ZS -4.03%, WDAY -4.02%, UPST -3.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.25% at $149.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
